rationale: Fingerprint matches `Array.from({length: Number(t)}, ...)` generators (expo-cli). Feed `""`: `Number("") = 0`, `Array.from({length: 0}, ...) = []`. Feed `"0"`: same result. Rust `split_lines+filter_empty+json_extract(sentinel)` on `""` yields `[]` (filter_empty removes empty input). Rust on `"0"` yields `[]` (no object has the sentinel key). Both empty — contract holds. Happy-path fixtures await a `sequence_range` transform.
